meta.homeDescription: A browser safety layer for data leaks, toxic language, and unsafe content across generative AI and social platforms — calm, explainable, auditable.

landingPage.metaTitle: Confidential Agent — Safety for AI, social, and everyday work
landingPage.metaDescription: A refined browser layer that prevents data leaks, reduces toxicity, and blocks unsafe content across generative AI and social platforms — with calm, auditable decisions.
landingPage.heroTitle: Protection that travels with every message — and every model.
landingPage.heroPunch: Source code, configs, keys, and customer context get pasted into AI chats and social tools every day — often straight onto the public internet. We catch it before it leaves.
landingPage.heroLead: Confidential Agent intercepts risky text before submit: data loss prevention for engineering, tone and safety for everyone else — one extension, policies you control, incidents you can audit.
landingPage.bandTitle: All you need in one place
landingPage.bandLead: A single layer that works where your teams already type — no rip-and-replace of every app.
landingPage.feat1Body: One extension across generative AI surfaces, internal tools, and public social threads.
landingPage.feat2Body: Detects secrets, internal URLs, credentials, and PII inside pasted snippets and mixed prompts.
landingPage.feat3Body: Flags harsh or unsafe language and suggests constructive alternatives before send.
landingPage.feat4Body: Deterministic rules plus orchestrated agents for scored decisions and explanations.
landingPage.feat5Body: Usage signals, blocked sends, and graph traces your security team can review.
landingPage.feat6Body: Point the extension at your API — keep analysis inside a perimeter you trust when required.
landingPage.hwLead: No hidden magic — install, connect, and every risky send gets a second chance.
landingPage.hw1Body: Add the browser extension and connect it to your Confidential Agent API endpoint.
landingPage.hw2Body: We evaluate text before it leaves the browser: secrets in code, toxic replies, policy violations.
landingPage.hw3Body: Allow, anonymize, block, or warn — with reasons and telemetry your org can audit.
landingPage.heroNote: Clear decisions. Calm copy. Evidence your security and people teams can stand behind.
landingPage.stripTitle: One fragile moment can become a headline
landingPage.stripSub: The same keyboard powers ChatGPT threads, internal tickets, DMs, and public comments. Confidential Agent is built for that reality — not a single vendor logo.
landingPage.problemTitle: The risk is broader than “just AI”
landingPage.problemLead: Teams need guardrails for secrecy, tone, safety, and compliance — wherever words turn into action.
landingPage.risk1Body: API keys, credentials, internal URLs, and personal data regularly appear in prompts, replies, and posts — often by accident.
landingPage.risk2Body: Stress turns into sharp words. Left unchecked, it erodes culture, damages brands, and creates legal exposure.
landingPage.risk3Body: From self-harm ideation to sexual content, organizations need compassionate interruption — not silent failures.
landingPage.risk4Body: Leaders require consistent policies, explainable decisions, and logs that stand up to review — not screenshots in Slack.
landingPage.solveLead: We stop the send, explain why in plain language, and offer a better path: redaction, reframing, or a pause for review.
landingPage.solve1: Policies aligned to your risk appetite
landingPage.solve2: Browser-native coverage without replatforming every app
landingPage.solve3: Incidents, telemetry, and improvement loops in one dashboard
landingPage.demoLead: The same principles apply whether the risk is a leaked secret or a harmful sentence — clarity first, then choice.
landingPage.blockedMsg: This cannot be sent as written. Review the redacted version or cancel.
landingPage.toneMsg: This wording could damage trust or psychological safety. Choose a constructive alternative, edit manually, or proceed consciously.
landingPage.toneAlt1: How can we address this respectfully and de-escalate?
landingPage.toneAlt2: What outcome do we need — and what’s the kindest path there?
landingPage.toneAlt3: Could we reframe this to protect collaboration?
landingPage.peopleTitle: For everyone accountable for what gets sent
landingPage.peopleLead: Security, IT, people partners, moderators, and team leads — Confidential Agent turns policy into lived practice.
landingPage.people1Body: Demonstrate control with explanations, not friction for every employee.
landingPage.people2Body: Reduce harm while keeping dialogue open — especially in remote and hybrid teams.
landingPage.people3Body: Scale thoughtful moderation on the channels where your brand is visible.
landingPage.privacyTitle: Your programming source code is not “just text”
landingPage.privacyLead: Developers paste private repo snippets, .env excerpts, stack traces, and ticket dumps into ChatGPT, Copilot-style assistants, Stack Overflow, Discord, or “temporary” pastes. That is how confidential business logic, customer data, and infrastructure details end up on systems your company does not control.
landingPage.privacy1Title: Pastes that mix code and company secrets
landingPage.privacy1Body: Production patterns, internal endpoints, API keys in examples, and customer-specific identifiers routinely hide inside a “quick prompt”. Confidential Agent can block, mask, or escalate those payloads according to your policy — before the HTTP request leaves the browser.
landingPage.privacy2Body: The fastest unblock is often dropping a whole file or screenshot into a web assistant. That habit scales risk across the org. The extension applies consistent rules at send-time so teams keep velocity without normalizing exfiltration.
landingPage.privacy3Title: Evidence for AppSec, risk, and compliance
landingPage.privacy3Body: Incidents capture what was detected, which action was taken, and why — so engineering and security leadership can demonstrate duty of care without reading every channel by hand.
landingPage.archLead: Operational truth in MongoDB, semantic depth with Qdrant and OpenAI embeddings — designed to extend, not lock you in.
landingPage.ctaBandTitle: Give every teammate a safety net they trust
landingPage.ctaBandLead: Install Confidential Agent, connect your API, and replace anxious moments with teachable, logged decisions.
landingPage.imageHeroAlt: Diverse professionals collaborating in a bright office
landingPage.imageSolveAlt: Colleagues reviewing a laptop screen together
landingPage.imageP3Alt: Community manager working at a laptop

landing.heroTitle: A security layer between your team and generative AI
landing.heroSubtitle: Browser extension plus API: detect sensitive data, enforce allow / anonymize / block / warn, and log incidents for compliance.
landing.how1Body: The extension catches prompts before they leave the browser.
landing.how2Body: Rules + LangGraph agents score risk and choose an action.
landing.how3Body: Incidents and telemetry land in MongoDB-backed storage for review.
landing.dataQdrant: Qdrant — embedding vectors for semantic workflows
landing.dataEmbed: OpenAI text-embedding-3-small — same API key as your stack
landing.installSubtitle: Choose your browser. Use the developer build until store listings are live.
landing.devBuildHint: Load apps/browser-extension from chrome://extensions in developer mode.
landing.associateTitle: Connect the extension to your API
landing.associateSubtitle: In extension options, set the API base URL (e.g. http://localhost:8080). Add an API key from the dashboard when enforcement is enabled.
landing.associateStep1: Install the extension for your browser.
landing.associateStep2: Run security-api locally or use your deployed URL.
landing.associateStep3: Paste the API URL (and API key if required) in extension options.
landing.f1Body: Content scripts cover major AI surfaces before submission.
landing.f2Body: Deterministic rules plus AFE, AVS, ASI, AC orchestration.
landing.f3Body: Site signals prioritize selector fixes and coverage.
